books.title: The Little Prince
books.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
books.description: A poetic tale of a pilot stranded in the desert who meets a young prince from another planet.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship focusing on writing readable, maintainable code.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: Tiny changes lead to remarkable results — practical strategies for forming good habits.

books.title: Introduction to Algorithms
books.author: Cormen, Leiserson, Rivest, Stein
books.description: Comprehensive introduction to modern algorithm design and analysis.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A brief history of humankind, exploring how Homo sapiens came to dominate the planet.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: Explores the two systems that drive the way we think — one fast, intuitive, and emotional; the other slower, more deliberative, and logical.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A magical story about following your dreams and listening to your heart.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
